title: Lazy Sunday Bratwurst Wrap
description: A delicious German-inspired wrap filled with juicy bratwurst and topped with sauerkraut and caramelized onions.
instructions: 1. Preheat a grill to medium-high heat.
2. Grill the bratwurst for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
3. Meanwhile, cook the sauerkraut in a pan over medium heat until slightly browned.
4. In a separate pan, caramelize the onions over low heat for 15-20 minutes.
5. Warm the tortilla by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
6. Assemble the wrap by spreading the mustard on the tortilla, followed by the bratwurst, sauerkraut, and caramelized onions.
7. Top with chopped parsley and season with salt and pepper to taste.
